description_long: This object consists of a group of ten pumpkins arranged in two rows, with five pumpkins in each row. The pumpkins vary slightly in size and shape, with some being rounder and others more squat. The front row features five pumpkins with carved faces, each displaying a different expression, ranging from traditional jack-o'-lantern smiles to more menacing or surprised looks. The back row contains five uncarved pumpkins, each with a visible green stem and a smooth, orange surface. The carved pumpkins have cutouts for eyes, noses, and mouths, with some showing teeth or stylized features. The overall appearance is festive and suitable for a Halloween or autumn-themed urban display.
description: A group of ten pumpkins, five of which are carved with expressive faces and five uncarved, arranged in two neat rows. The pumpkins are orange with green stems and display a mix of traditional and playful jack-o'-lantern designs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two rows of pumpkins, with the carved faces mostly hidden and the green stems visible on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all ten pumpkins, with the five carved jack-o'-lantern faces clearly visible in the front row and five uncarved pumpkins behind.
description_view_2: Rear side view showing the backs of the pumpkins, with the carved faces mostly obscured and the stems prominent.
description_view_3: Back view showing only the uncarved pumpkins, with smooth orange surfaces and green stems, while the carved faces are not visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: The front row of pumpkins features traditional jack-o'-lantern carving patterns, including triangular eyes, crescent-shaped eyes, round eyes, and various mouth shapes such as toothy grins, frowns, and surprised 'O' shapes. The style is playful and expressive, with each pumpkin displaying a unique face. The back row is uncarved.
